Units of analysis are country-pair trade flows and country-level incomes/welfare; the specific finding concerns welfare effects on the poorest countries when reductions are concentrated among wealthy countries.

title: Why Don't People Insure Late Life Consumption: A Framing Explanation of the Under-Annuitization Puzzle
author: Jeffrey R. Brown, Jeffrey R. Kling, Sendhil Mullainathan, Marian V. Wrobel

The setting captures hypothetical retirement decumulation choices and evaluates how framing and bequest salience causally affect stated annuity demand.

title: Queens
author: Oeindrila Dube, S.P. Harish
